result: If I could change the world in one way, I’d make sure that everyone on the planet has reliable access to the basics of life—clean water, nutritious food, safe shelter, essential healthcare, and a decent education. Eliminating extreme poverty would remove a huge source of suffering, free people to pursue their talents, and let humanity thrive together.

message.content: If I could change the world in one way, I’d make sure that everyone on the planet has reliable access to the basics of life—clean water, nutritious food, safe shelter, essential healthcare, and a decent education. Eliminating extreme poverty would remove a huge source of suffering, free people to pursue their talents, and let humanity thrive together.
